data.name: Primeval Bounty
data.oracle_text:
Whenever you cast a creature spell, create a 3/3 green Beast creature token.
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put three +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you gain 3 life.

data.name: Progenitus
data.oracle_text:
Protection from everything
If Progenitus would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, reveal Progenitus and shuffle it into its owner's library instead.
data.flavor_text: The Soul of the World has returned.

data.name: Pulse Tracker
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses 1 life.
data.flavor_text:
"You can't think your way out of this, Jace. Thought implies life, and life requires a pulse—music to a hunter's ears."
—Vraska

data.name: Pyromancer's Goggles
data.oracle_text: {T}: Add {R}. When that mana is spent to cast a red instant or sorcery spell, copy that spell and you may choose new targets for the copy.
data.flavor_text: Chandra treasures her mentor's goggles, not for their magical properties, but for the memory of the woman who taught her to truly harness the power of fire.

data.name: Quakestrider Ceratops
data.flavor_text:
"For the first time in all my travels, I've encountered a creature I can only describe as an apex herbivore."
—Vivien Reid

data.name: Quick-Draw Katana
data.oracle_text:
During your turn, equipped creature gets +2/+0 and has first strike. (It deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)
data.flavor_text:
"Draw swiftly, strike cleanly, and sheathe before the ground tastes blood."
—Munetsugu Takeno, *Way of the Samurai*

data.name: Quick Study
data.oracle_text: Draw two cards.
data.flavor_text: At first, Johann was annoyed that the library had decided to reorganize itself. But he had to admit that storing the cookbooks in the cauldron made a certain kind of sense.

data.name: Quilled Greatwurm
data.oracle_text:
Trample
Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage during your turn, put that many +1/+1 counters on it. (It must survive to get the counters.)
You may cast this card from your graveyard by removing six counters from among creatures you control in addition to paying its other costs.

data.name: Raging Redcap
data.oracle_text: Double strike (This creature deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.)
data.flavor_text: Many tales of redcap terror begin with two simple things: bloodlust and stolen steel.

data.name: Raise the Past
data.oracle_text: Return all creature cards with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
data.flavor_text: At Strixhaven University, learning about the past means talking to those who were there.

data.name: Rakdos Guildgate
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.
data.flavor_text: Enter and indulge your darkest fantasies, for you may never pass this way again.

data.name: Ramos, Dragon Engine
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever you cast a spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Ramos for each of that spell's colors.
Remove five +1/+1 counters from Ramos: Add {W}{W}{U}{U}{B}{B}{R}{R}{G}{G}. Activate only once each turn.

data.name: Rampaging Baloths
data.oracle_text:
Trample
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a 4/4 green Beast creature token.
data.flavor_text:
"When the land is angry, so are they."
—Nissa Revane

data.name: Rapacious Dragon
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
data.flavor_text:
"Surely it won't notice if I take—"
—Theria the Sly, last words

data.name: Ravenous Amulet
data.oracle_text:
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw a card and put a soul counter on this artifact. Activate only as a sorcery.
{4}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Each opponent loses life equal to the number of soul counters on this artifact.
data.flavor_text: Each of its owners' final moments is remembered within the roiling stone.

data.name: Ravenous Giant
data.oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, this creature deals 1 damage to you.
data.flavor_text: The might of an army with the restraint of a child.

data.name: Reassembling Skeleton
data.oracle_text: {1}{B}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.
data.flavor_text:
"If none of the bones are original, is it even the same skele—aaagh!"
—Mort the Philosopher, last words

data.name: Reclamation Sage
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may destroy target artifact or enchantment.
data.flavor_text: "What was once formed by masons, shaped by smiths, or given life by mages, I will return to the embrace of the earth."

data.name: Redcap Gutter-Dweller
data.oracle_text:
Menace
When this creature enters, create two 1/1 black Rat creature tokens with "This token can't block."
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.

data.name: Refute
data.oracle_text: Counter target spell. Draw a card, then discard a card.
data.flavor_text: "I said *no*!"

data.name: Regal Caracal
data.oracle_text:
Other Cats you control get +1/+1 and have lifelink. (Damage dealt by those creatures also causes you to gain that much life.)
When this creature enters, create two 1/1 white Cat creature tokens with lifelink.
data.flavor_text: Oketra's closest viziers are known as her chosen, though others may have a better claim to that moniker.

data.name: Release the Dogs
data.oracle_text: Create four 1/1 white Dog creature tokens.
data.flavor_text: They charge into battle and out for their morning walk with the same exuberance.

data.name: Resolute Reinforcements
data.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.
data.flavor_text: Morale rarely survives the sudden appearance of a squad of Sursi skirmishers at an army's flank.

data.name: Revenge of the Rats
data.oracle_text:
Create a tapped 1/1 black Rat creature token for each creature card in your graveyard.
Flashback {2}{B}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
data.flavor_text:
"The cats are behaving oddly today. Almost like they're all scared of something."
—Entry in a heavily chewed journal

data.name: Rise of the Dark Realms
data.oracle_text: Put all creature cards from all graveyards onto the battlefield under your control.
data.flavor_text:
"For every living person there are generations of dead. Which realm would you rather rule?"
—Liliana Vess

data.name: Rite of Replication
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {5} (You may pay an additional {5} as you cast this spell.)
Create a token that's a copy of target creature. If this spell was kicked, create five of those tokens instead.

data.name: Rite of the Dragoncaller
data.oracle_text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, create a 5/5 red Dragon creature token with flying.
data.flavor_text: All at once, a quiet world was seized by wings, claws, fangs, and fire.

data.name: River's Rebuke
data.oracle_text: Return all nonland permanents target player controls to their owner's hand.
data.flavor_text: The waters that give the River Herald merfolk their name are sacred to their culture; they do not abide invaders to sail upon them.

data.name: Rogue's Passage
data.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{4}, {T}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn.
data.flavor_text: Rumors quickly spread among thieves about a labyrinth without walls and a prize beyond all measures of worth.

data.name: Ruby, Daring Tracker
data.oracle_text:
Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)
Whenever Ruby attacks while you control a creature with power 4 or greater, Ruby gets +2/+2 until end of turn.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.
data.flavor_text: Neither the sharpest thorns nor the foulest beasts would stop her from finding her brother.

This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.

data.name: Run Away Together
data.oracle_text: Choose two target creatures controlled by different players. Return those creatures to their owners' hands.
data.flavor_text:
"Virtue is virtue, whatever the heart that nurtures it."
—Malacan, Vantress exile

data.name: Rune-Scarred Demon
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: The litany of the infernal on his flesh pulses to the beating of his dark heart.

data.name: Rune-Sealed Wall
data.oracle_text:
Defender
{T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
data.flavor_text:
"If the giant, repelling wards aren't enough to keep out nosy visitors, the huge wall should help."
—Kastigan, reclusive runecaster

data.name: Sanguine Indulgence
data.oracle_text:
This spell costs {3} less to cast if you've gained 3 or more life this turn.
Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.
data.flavor_text:
"Drink from the vein? How provincial."
—Lord Duchorvin

data.name: Sanguine Syphoner
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: As life returned to the bogs of Bala Ged, the vampires returned to feed upon it.

data.name: Savage Ventmaw
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}{R}{R}{G}{G}{G}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

data.name: Savannah Lions
data.flavor_text:
"One alone is fearsome; one among many is unstoppable."
—Benalish proverb

data.name: Scavenging Ooze
data.oracle_text: {G}: Exile target card from a graveyard. If it was a creature card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: In nature, not a single bone or scrap of flesh goes to waste.

data.name: Scorching Dragonfire
data.oracle_text: Scorching Dragonfire deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If that creature or planeswalker would die this turn, exile it instead.
data.flavor_text: As the blaze raced toward her, Syr Ameril closed her eyes and pictured Castle Ardenvale so her last thoughts would be of home.

data.name: Scoured Barrens

This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

data.name: Scrawling Crawler

At the beginning of your upkeep, each player draws a card.
Whenever an opponent draws a card, that player loses 1 life.
data.flavor_text: It spreads the machine gospel of New Phyrexia, its task incomplete until all surrender to perfection.

data.name: Searslicer Goblin
data.oracle_text: Raid — At the beginning of your end step, if you attacked this turn, create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token.
data.flavor_text: Ikko hadn't intended to start a riot, but now that it was under way, he was having a lot of fun.

data.name: Secluded Courtyard
data.oracle_text:
As this land enters, choose a creature type.
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a creature spell of the chosen type or activate an ability of a creature source of the chosen type.

data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Target opponent discards two cards.
• Creatures your opponents control get -1/-1 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: While searching the foreboding woods for his favorite helmet, Syr Verlor lost his second-favorite helmet.

data.name: Seismic Rupture
data.oracle_text: Seismic Rupture deals 2 damage to each creature without flying.
data.flavor_text: The raiding party advanced on the lone figure, confident they had her cornered and helpless. Then she raised her hands, and the ground opened with a fiery roar.

data.name: Seize the Spoils

As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card.
Draw two cards and create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

First strike, vigilance

data.flavor_text: Born of the infinite void between realities, the Eldrazi have one goal: to consume.

data.name: Skeleton Archer
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, it deals 1 damage to any target.
data.flavor_text:
"Soul, flesh, even eyes—none of these are strictly necessary for deadly precision."
—Modriss of Zargoth Fen

data.name: Skyknight Squire
data.oracle_text:
Whenever another creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
As long as this creature has three or more +1/+1 counters on it, it has flying and is a Knight in addition to its other types.
data.flavor_text: Before Pashin could become the greatest skyknight in the kingdom, he'd have to survive his first flight.

data.name: Skyraker Giant
data.oracle_text: Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.)
data.flavor_text: She will not be content until hers is the highest head in the sky.

data.name: Skyship Buccaneer
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Raid — When this creature enters, if you attacked this turn, draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"It's a pirate's nature to be free of law. Gravity is no exception."
—Kari Zev, skyship captain

data.name: Slagstorm
data.oracle_text:

• Slagstorm deals 3 damage to each creature.
• Slagstorm deals 3 damage to each player.
data.flavor_text:
"As long as we have the will to fight, we are never without weapons."
—Koth of the Hammer

data.name: Slumbering Cerberus
data.oracle_text:
This creature doesn't untap during your untap step.
Morbid — At the beginning of each end step, if a creature died this turn, untap this creature.
data.flavor_text: The plan seemed to be going perfectly, until Mino realized the third head was no longer snoring.

data.name: Snakeskin Veil
data.oracle_text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains hexproof until end of turn. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
data.flavor_text: Most travelers panic when they stumble upon the skin of a giant rattlewurm. Landry saw it as a gift.

data.name: Solemn Simulacrum
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
When this creature dies, you may draw a card.

Activated abilities of sources with the chosen name can't be activated unless they're mana abilities.

data.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, exile target card from a graveyard.
{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile each opponent's graveyard.
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

data.name: Soul-Shackled Zombie
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, exile up to two target cards from a single graveyard. If at least one creature card was exiled this way, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text: The ritual successfully rebound her soul to her body, but not quite in the way she'd planned.

data.name: Soulstone Sanctuary
data.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{4}: This land becomes a 3/3 creature with vigilance and all creature types. It's still a land.

data.oracle_text: {2}{R}: Target creature can't block this turn.

"If you hear a choking sort of cough, it's about to get really hot."
—Raff Slugeater, goblin shortcutter

data.oracle_text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

data.name: Think Twice
data.oracle_text:
Draw a card.
Flashback {2}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
data.flavor_text: "Either I know just the spell I need, or I'm about to."

data.name: Thornweald Archer
data.oracle_text:
Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.)
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
data.flavor_text: Their arrows are tipped with basilisk eyes and fletched with cockatrice feathers.

This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}.

data.name: Thousand-Year Storm
data.oracle_text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, copy it for each other instant and sorcery spell you've cast before it this turn. You may choose new targets for the copies.
data.flavor_text: Ral's storm crackled with mystical detections: Planeswalkers were infiltrating Ravnica.

data.name: Thrashing Brontodon
data.oracle_text: {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.
data.flavor_text: It cares more about preserving the herd's territory than about preserving itself.

data.name: Three Tree Mascot
data.oracle_text:
Changeling (This card is every creature type.)
{1}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only once each turn.
data.flavor_text:
"Every paw and claw should be at the celebrations in Three Tree City! Even the float is smiling!"
—*Valley Gazetteer*, four-acorn review

data.name: Thrill of Possibility
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card.
Draw two cards.
data.flavor_text:
"Remember all the great heroes who were careful and never did anything risky? Me neither."
—Syr Carah, the Bold

data.name: Time Stop
data.oracle_text: End the turn. (Exile all spells and abilities, including this spell. The player whose turn it is discards down to their maximum hand size. Damage heals and "this turn" and "until end of turn" effects end.)

data.name: Tinybones, Bauble Burglar
data.oracle_text:
Whenever an opponent discards a card, exile it from their graveyard with a stash counter on it.
During your turn, you may play cards you don't own with stash counters on them from exile, and mana of any type can be spent to cast those spells.
{3}{B}, {T}: Each opponent discards a card. Activate only as a sorcery.

data.name: Tolarian Terror
data.oracle_text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each instant and sorcery card in your graveyard.
Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)
data.flavor_text: Afterward, a number of treatises on sea serpent morphology were swiftly revised.

data.name: Tragic Banshee
data.oracle_text: Morbid — When this creature enters, target creature an opponent controls gets -1/-1 until end of turn. If a creature died this turn, that creature gets -13/-13 until end of turn instead.
data.flavor_text: She attended her own burial service, eager for company.

This land enters tapped.

data.name: Treetop Snarespinner

Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.)
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
{2}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery.
data.flavor_text: The griffins think they rule the sky, but the spiders know better.

data.name: Tribute to Hunger
data.oracle_text: Target opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice. You gain life equal to that creature's toughness.
data.flavor_text:
"Secluded park. Dual puncture wounds. I told you these aren't random murders. Get the stakes ready."
—Rem Karolus, monster slayer

data.name: Trygon Predator
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may destroy target artifact or enchantment that player controls.
data.flavor_text: Held aloft by metabolized magic, trygons are ravenous for sources of mystic fuel.

data.name: Twinblade Blessing
data.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature has double strike. (It deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.)

data.name: Twinblade Paladin
data.oracle_text:
Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
As long as you have 25 or more life, this creature has double strike. (It deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.)

data.name: Twinflame Tyrant
data.oracle_text:
Flying
If a source you control would deal damage to an opponent or a permanent an opponent controls, it deals double that damage instead.
data.flavor_text:
"Job only paid enough for one head. I'm out."
—Peren, veteran mercenary

data.name: Uncharted Haven
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color.
{T}: Add one mana of the chosen color.
data.flavor_text:
"There are lands beyond Valley. Wild, calamity-scarred, and beautiful."
—Farfeather, birdfolk scout

data.name: Uncharted Voyage
data.oracle_text:
Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.
Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
data.flavor_text: As his ship passed the waterlogged wrecks, Markos realized he wasn't the first person to try sailing out of the Underworld.

data.name: Undying Malice
data.oracle_text: Until end of turn, target creature gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it."
data.flavor_text: Lazlo was going to find the jerks who stabbed him in the back and stab them in their fronts.

data.name: Unflinching Courage
data.oracle_text:
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has trample and lifelink. (Damage dealt by the creature also causes its controller to gain that much life.)
data.flavor_text: As Trostani's influence grew, vitality spread through the Conclave—much to the other guilds' dismay.

data.name: Unsummon
data.oracle_text: Return target creature to its owner's hand.
data.flavor_text: Tolarian apprentices learn to liberate aetheric energy long before they are taught to bind it.

data.name: Untamed Hunger
data.oracle_text:
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature gets +2/+1 and has menace. (It can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
data.flavor_text:
"Mindlessness is not weakness. When we are lost to hunger we are unstoppable."
—Drana, Kalastria bloodchief

data.name: Valkyrie's Call
data.oracle_text: Whenever a nontoken, non-Angel creature you control dies, return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it. It has flying and is an Angel in addition to its other types.
data.flavor_text: "Welcome, worthy one."

data.name: Valorous Stance
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Target creature gains indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)
• Destroy target creature with toughness 4 or greater.
data.flavor_text:
"Every choice alters the path of fate."
—Sarkhan Vol

data.name: Vampire Gourmand
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, draw a card and this creature can't be blocked this turn.
data.flavor_text: "He asked me if I wanted to come in for a bite to eat. Who am I to turn down a stranger's kindness?"

data.name: Vampire Interloper
data.oracle_text:
Flying
This creature can't block.
data.flavor_text: He hovers silently above the city, scouting for when the ripest necks pass through the darkest alleys.

data.name: Vampire Neonate
data.oracle_text: {2}, {T}: Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: One day, they may be paragons of deadly elegance. For the moment, they possess nothing but thirst.

Flying
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)

Flying
This creature can't block.
When this creature enters, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.
data.flavor_text: "Don't worry, little friends. We will not be hungry much longer."

data.name: Vampire Spawn
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text: Unsuccessful vampire hunters often wind up as ravenous spawn.

data.name: Vampiric Rites
data.oracle_text: {1}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: You gain 1 life and draw a card.
data.flavor_text: Scions of the Markov line take particular pleasure in the perversion of humans' holy rituals.

data.name: Vanguard Seraph
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever you gain life for the first time each turn, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
data.flavor_text: She guides expedition parties through the perilous floating ruins of Zendikar's ancient empires.

data.name: Vengeful Bloodwitch
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: "You thought I was unarmed? Poor fool—your veins are my arsenal."

data.name: Venom Connoisseur
data.oracle_text: Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature gains deathtouch until end of turn. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, all creatures you control gain deathtouch until end of turn.

data.name: Viashino Pyromancer
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to target player or planeswalker.
data.flavor_text: "I trained with the Ghitu, and I respect the fire as they do."

data.name: Vile Entomber
data.oracle_text:
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
When this creature enters, search your library for a card, put that card into your graveyard, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: The dead are lonely in the crypt and always eager for company.

data.name: Vivien Reid
data.oracle_text:
+1: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
−3: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying.
−8: You get an emblem with "Creatures you control get +2/+2 and have vigilance, trample, and indestructible."

data.name: Vizier of the Menagerie
data.oracle_text:
You may look at the top card of your library any time.
You may cast creature spells from the top of your library.
You can spend mana of any type to cast creature spells.

data.name: Volley Veteran
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, it deals damage to target creature an opponent controls equal to the number of Goblins you control.
data.flavor_text: They didn't fire in unison, nor in the same direction. Most didn't even use arrows. Somehow it worked perfectly.

data.name: Voracious Greatshark
data.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
When this creature enters, counter target artifact or creature spell.
data.flavor_text: There is no boat big enough.

data.name: Wardens of the Cycle

Morbid — At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, choose one —
• You gain 2 life.
• You draw a card and you lose 1 life.
data.flavor_text: "The wheel turns, and what meets its end begins again."

data.name: Wary Thespian
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters or dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
data.flavor_text: Giorgio paced the stage anxiously. This was their final rehearsal, but there were still so many mistakes!

—*The Invokers' Tales*
